metadata.name: Process an Accelerated Death Benefit Claim

description: A life insurance policyholder has been diagnosed with a terminal illness and wants to access a portion of their death benefit while still living.

nodes.task_description: Identify the policyholder and verify their policy includes an accelerated death benefit rider.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the policy has the required rider.

nodes.task_description: Request medical documentation from a physician confirming the terminal diagnosis.

expected_outcome.value: Agent explains the documentation needed to support the claim.

nodes.task_description: Once documentation is received, calculate and process the allowable benefit payment.

expected_outcome.value: Agent calculates and disburses the accelerated payment to the policyholder.
